items.quote: Neeraj brings rare depth — he thinks in systems, communicates in business outcomes, and delivers engineering excellence without compromise. Our platform transformation simply wouldn't have succeeded without his architectural leadership.
items.name: Director of Engineering

items.quote: One of the most trusted architects I've worked with. He balances pragmatism with vision, and his ability to align C-suite stakeholders with engineering reality is exceptional.
items.name: Chief Technology Officer

items.quote: His open-source contributions and production systems reflect the same standard — clean architecture, thoughtful documentation, and genuine care for developer experience.
items.name: Principal Engineer
